summary: E2E Playwright test of BDApps Digital overhaul + Add-Ons after the recent UniversalAndroidPreview hooks-extraction fix. Verified: login, welcome modal, exactly 3 tabs, 8/8/8 templates per tab, demo-tour btn, creation flow steps 1-4 with sticky progress bar, customize step has 0 color pickers, ConfigureSidebar (Brand/Layout/Payments/Domain/Store) renders correct sections per tab, real-time primary-color update reflects in preview (4 elements re-painted #22c55e), Workout timer toggle works without rules-of-hooks error, Ride Fare screen reachable (eco/prem/xl partially), Android payment processing 1.5s spinner -> 'Order Placed', celebration screen with all 5 action cards (download/github/share/analytics + deploy for web, submit-store for android), submit-store-modal + confirm flow, AddOns page (6 Recharts containers, campaign-modal, hero counters), whats-next-panel. ZERO 'rules-of-hooks', 'invalid hook', or 'compiled with problems' errors — the recent hooks fix is verified solid. 2 NEW critical bugs found: (1) action-deploy throws an unhandled clipboard.writeText error overlay, (2) addBuildFile state not persisted to localStorage so Admin Provisioning -> Build Files cross-session verification fails.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Go Live Now' / action-deploy triggers Uncaught NotAllowedError: "Failed to execute 'writeText' on 'Clipboard': Write permission denied." — a full-screen red runtime-error overlay appears. The clipboard call should be wrapped in try/catch with a fallback toast (or use document.execCommand fallback). Spec says 'action-deploy copies preview link and toasts success' but no success toast appears.

integration_issues.flow: Submit to BDApps Store -> Admin Provisioning Build Files
integration_issues.issue: addBuildFile in AppContext appends to in-memory state ONLY (no localStorage persistence — see AppContext.jsx lines 49-52 persist apps/liteApps/ads/storeApps/storeLayout but NO useEffect persists buildFiles). After developer submits an Android app and we logout/login as admin (page reload), the submitted entry is LOST. Admin /admin/provisioning Build Files tab still shows only the seeded 3 entries (Recipe of the Day / Skill Tutor / Music Box). The acceptance criterion 'new APK appears in /admin/provisioning Build Files tab with status Pending Approval' is therefore NOT met across sessions.

cfg-subdomain and cfg-custom-domain inputs are not immediately visible — Domain accordion is collapsed by default. Spec lists them as required visible fields for web template. Either make cfg-section-domain defaultOpen or document that user must expand it.

After clicking cfg-pay-ssl, cfg-model-proxy/cfg-model-direct/cfg-platform-fee did not appear. Most likely the switch was already ON by default (since use-template-web-ecom seeded SSL=true) and the click toggled it OFF. Recommend pre-reading the switch state via aria-checked before asserting, or setting a deterministic default. Carry-over from iter-4.

issues: api.fontshare.com CORS error still emits on every page load (3-6x). Self-host or remove the Fontshare <link> in /app/frontend/public/index.html (carry-over from iter-3 and iter-4).

action_items: (HIGH) Wrap navigator.clipboard.writeText in try/catch inside the action-deploy handler in AppBuilder.jsx (or wherever celebration actions live). On NotAllowedError, fallback to a toast like 'Preview link: <url>' so the user still sees the URL. This bug blocks the Web flow acceptance criterion 'action-deploy copies preview link and toasts success'.

(HIGH) Persist buildFiles to localStorage in AppContext.jsx — add useEffect(() => localStorage.setItem('bdapps_buildfiles', JSON.stringify(buildFiles)), [buildFiles]) and seed via getStored(...) like the other resources. Without this, the developer->admin Submit-to-Store integration cannot be verified across sessions/reloads.
(MED) Make cfg-section-domain defaultOpen for web templates so cfg-subdomain + cfg-custom-domain are immediately visible per spec.
(MED) Same for cfg-section-pay — currently only Brand is defaultOpen for web/android. Either default-expand all sections or surface the controls in a flat layout.
(LOW / carry-over) Self-host or remove Fontshare CDN <link> to silence CORS errors.
(LOW / carry-over) Wrap Recharts in min-height to silence width(-1) warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: AppContext.jsx — addBuildFile (line 99) and updateBuildFileStatus (line 96) lack a useEffect to mirror buildFiles into localStorage. This is the root cause of the cross-session bug above. Quick fix: useEffect(() => localStorage.setItem('bdapps_buildfiles', JSON.stringify(buildFiles)), [buildFiles]) and replace seedBuildFiles default with getStored('bdapps_buildfiles', seedBuildFiles).
Celebration action handlers must wrap browser-permission-sensitive APIs (clipboard.writeText, share, downloads) in try/catch to avoid uncaught runtime errors that bring up the CRA red overlay.

UniversalAndroidPreview.jsx — the hooks extraction (PaymentScreen/OtpScreen/LessonScreen/WorkoutScreen/FareScreen as capitalised components) is a correct fix; verified emu-fit-toggle-timer no longer crashes and Android payment proceeds through processing -> done without rules-of-hooks errors.

ConfigureSidebar — only 1-2 sections are defaultOpen across templates; user has to expand the rest. Consider keeping all sections open by default in a vertical scroll, or providing a 'Expand all' toggle. Spec assumes most cfg-* testids are immediately reachable.
Carry-over: interactive/UniversalWebPreview (583 LOC) and UniversalAndroidPreview (378 LOC after extraction) still mix many template render branches in one file — refactor for code-splitting.

success_rate.frontend: ~88%: All 8 high-priority hook-related items PASS (no rules-of-hooks errors, no compile errors, Workout timer + Ride Fare + Android Payment all work). 2 HIGH bugs found (action-deploy clipboard crash, addBuildFile not persisted). 3 MED issues (collapsed accordions hiding required-visible testids).

test_credentials: developer@bdapps.com / dev123 (works). admin@bdapps.com / admin123 (works — admin sidebar + Provisioning Build Files tab render).
seed_data_creation: None. Cleared localStorage['bdapps-digital-welcomed'] to re-trigger welcome modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recent hooks fix VERIFIED working. The 2 NEW bugs to retest after main-agent fix: (1) action-deploy on web celebration must NOT throw a red overlay — should toast 'Preview link copied' or 'Preview link: <url>'. Test: login dev -> /digital -> tab-web -> use-template-web-ecom -> design-option -> design-continue -> cust-name + cust-preview -> cfg-generate -> action-deploy -> check NO [data-react-error] / .react-error-overlay appears and a [role=status]/toast appears. (2) Submit-to-Store persistence: login dev -> tab-android -> use-template-and-ecom -> full flow -> action-submit-store -> confirm-submit-store -> RELOAD page (or logout-login as admin) -> /admin/provisioning -> Build Files tab -> assert the new TEST_Android_App entry is at top with Pending Approval status. Also useful: cfg-section-domain + cfg-section-pay default-open verification. Carry-over UNRESOLVED: Fontshare CORS noise (3-6 errors per load), Recharts width(-1) warnings (4 per /add-ons mount).
rca of the issue: Bug 1 (action-deploy clipboard crash): handler calls navigator.clipboard.writeText(previewUrl) without try/catch. Browser policy denies clipboard write in some contexts (iframe, missing user-gesture chain, headless permissions). Result: NotAllowedError bubbles to React, CRA dev overlay renders. Fix: try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url); toast.success('Preview link copied'); } catch { toast.success(`Preview link: ${url}`); }. Bug 2 (addBuildFile not persisted): AppContext.jsx persists 5 collections to localStorage (bdapps_apps, bdapps_liteapps, bdapps_ads, bdapps_store, bdapps_layout) but omits bdapps_buildfiles. On full page navigation (login redirect, refresh, logout), React provider re-mounts with seedBuildFiles, losing in-memory additions. Fix: add useEffect(() => localStorage.setItem('bdapps_buildfiles', JSON.stringify(buildFiles)), [buildFiles]) and initialise via const [buildFiles, setBuildFiles] = useState(() => getStored('bdapps_buildfiles', seedBuildFiles)).
